title: carpinus laxiflora
intro: Carpinus laxiflora, also known as the Chinese hornbeam or Chinese iron tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Betulaceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Carpinus laxiflora include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Carpinus laxiflora is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
